arts.ttl: Rihanna's boyfriend A$AP Rocky wants to buy EFL club for £15m after Wrexham success
arts.sum: The success of Wrexham and their Hollywood owners Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney is drawing more American celebrities to invest in EFL teams, with A$AP Rocky the latest to mount a takeover bid
